info.title: Total CMS API
info.description: Complete REST API for Total CMS - A modern flat-file content management system

tags.name: streaming
tags.description: File streaming operations with range request support

get.description: Display login form for default authentication

post.description: Authenticate user with credentials

get.description: Display login form for specific collection authentication

post.description: Authenticate user for specific collection access

get.description: Log out current user session

302.description: Redirect to login or home page

post.description: Log out current user session

302.description: Redirect to login or home page

get.description: Display access denied page
Get a list of all collections in the CMS

post.description: Create a new collection

get.description: Get all objects from a collection with optional filtering and pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of objects to return

post.description: Create a new object in the collection

delete.description: Delete a collection and all its objects

get.description: Get the collection index with object summaries and optional filtering

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Include filter - comma-separated field:value pairs (AND logic). Example: published:true,featured:true. For array fields like tags, checks if value exists in array (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: exclude
parameters.description: Exclude filter - comma-separated field:value pairs (OR logic). Example: draft:true,archived:true. Objects matching ANY criteria are excluded.

put.description: Rebuild the collection index from all objects

get.description: Get the schema definition for a collection
Get a specific object by ID

delete.description: Delete an object from the collection

post.description: Create a copy of an existing object

id.description: New object ID (optional, will be auto-generated if not provided)

post.description: Upload a file to a gallery or depot property

put.description: Update a specific property of an object

delete.description: Delete a property from an object

post.description: Create a subfolder within a depot (multi-file) property

delete.description: Clear cached files for a property (e.g., processed images)

post.description: Create a new card/item in a deck property

get.description: Get a specific deck item by ID

delete.description: Delete a deck item from the deck property

put.description: Update metadata for a specific item in a property (e.g., image alt text, file metadata)

patch.description: Partially update metadata for a property item

delete.description: Delete a specific file from a depot (multi-file) property
Clear cached versions of a specific file (e.g., processed images)

put.description: Move or rename a file within a depot property

get.description: Get a list of all available schemas

post.description: Create a new custom schema

get.description: Get a specific schema definition

delete.description: Delete a custom schema (built-in schemas cannot be deleted)

post.description: Import JSON data as objects into a collection
Import CSV data as objects into a collection
Generate and import fake data using Faker library
Import a custom schema definition from JSON
Import collections, schemas, and objects from a JumpStart export file

data.description: JumpStart export data containing collections, schemas, and objects

post.description: Import content and data from Total CMS version 1.x backup files

map_collections.description: Map old collection names to new names

post.description: Analyze Alloy CMS directory structure and content without importing. Returns statistics about blogs, embeds, and droplets found.

imageUploadsPath.description: Path to Alloy image uploads directory

post.description: Import blogs, embeds, and droplets from Alloy CMS. Processes import via job queue for large datasets.

imageUploadsPath.description: Path to Alloy image uploads directory

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to export

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to export

get.description: Export collection data and media files as a ZIP archive

parameters.name: include_media
parameters.description: Include media files (images, files, galleries) in ZIP

200.description: ZIP archive containing collection data and media

get.description: Export a schema definition as JSON
Export all collections, schemas, and objects as JumpStart format for project setup

parameters.name: collections
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of collections to export (all if not specified)

parameters.name: include_media
parameters.description: Include media files in export (creates larger file)

get.description: Export sample/demo data as JumpStart format with factory definitions for generating test data

200.description: JumpStart demo data with factory definitions

factory.description: Factory definitions for generating test data with Faker

get.description: Get an image with applied processing parameters
Download a file from an object property

parameters.name: inline
parameters.description: Display in browser instead of download

post.description: Download a password-protected file

get.description: Download a specific file from a depot (multi-file) property with Content-Disposition: attachment

post.description: Download a password-protected depot file

get.description: Stream a file with Content-Disposition: inline and HTTP range request support. Ideal for video/audio files.

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: HTTP range request for partial content

get.description: Stream a specific file from a depot (multi-file) property with range request support

parameters.name: Range
parameters.description: HTTP range request for partial content

get.description: Check if development mode is currently enabled

post.description: Enable development mode (disables caching, enables error display)

delete.description: Disable development mode (enables caching, production error handling)

get.description: Public endpoint for clearing all caches when admin interface is inaccessible. No authentication required - accessible from any location for customer self-service.

caches_cleared.description: List of cache types that were cleared

post.description: Send email via form submission with rate limiting. Useful for contact forms and notifications.
